name: testSelectAcquirerDropdownFunctionality
description: Click on 'Select acquirer' field opens a dropdown populated with acquirers
descriptionHtml: Click on 'Select acquirer' field opens a dropdown populated with acquirers

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Click on 'Select acquirer' field opens a dropdown populated with acquirers

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Verify: Dropdown list is not empty
